_comment: metadata for the word lists. labels + descriptions render in the filter-words viewer; order arrays control display sequence so a fresh git clone shows the same view regardless of filesystem ordering.

off.title: off
off.summary: nothing filtered. you'll see every message exactly as sent.

relaxed.title: relaxed
relaxed.summary: just the basics — slurs, threats, doxxing.

strict.title: strict
strict.summary: basics + profanity + suggestive words + sexual content.

relaxed/doxxing.label: doxxing
relaxed/doxxing.desc: sharing addresses, phone numbers, ip grabs, swat threats.

moderate/profanity.label: profanity
moderate/profanity.desc: common swears + insults that hit harder than casual.

strict/sex.label: sex
strict/sex.desc: explicit sexual terms, plus sex × harm overlap.
